name: Cheesecake- Carol Orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crust ingredients; press into a baking pan.
Bake for 10 minutes at 200°C.
2. Combine filling ingredients; mix well, and pour into baked crust.
3. Bake at 225°C for 10-12 minutes.
4. Reduce temperature to 100°C and bake for 1 hour.
Difficulty: easy to moderate
Precision: measure the ingredients
Recipe By: Carol Orange
